goal: Keep repo-facing narrative aligned with the latest promoted subset and held-basis decisions after Batch 2 lands.
successCriteria: README, COOKBOOK, doctor, scorecard, and verification report all reflect the latest promoted subset and held-basis wording.

explicitlyOutOfScope: No maturity changes beyond the tracked outcomes of packages 1-3.
